field_values.action_summary: The leader dismounts unarmed and offers the protagonist a metal armlet. The protagonist accepts, signaling peace. He is then lifted onto a Martian mount and taken away toward the distant hills.
field_values.camera_intent: Close-ups of the hand-off (the armlet); Medium shots of non-verbal communication and eye contact; Wide shot of the cavalcade moving toward the distant hills
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Armlet must remain visible on protagonist's arm after acceptance
Height differential during mount lifting process
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH003_SC005

## Production Intent
Establish a diplomatic pivot through non-verbal exchange and physical gestures of peace. The sequence must transition from high-tension standoff to a coordinated movement toward the distant hills, utilizing the armlet as the central symbolic object.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (transformed Earthman)
- The Leader
- martian_warriors

## Required Environments
- yellowish_moss_basin (circular basin with moss/vegetation)
- martian_distant_hills

## Continuity Constraints
- Armlet must remain visible on protagonist's arm after acceptance.
- Height differential during the mount lifting process must be captured.

## Beat List
- BT001: The Leader dismounts unarmed and offers the armlet.
- BT002: The protagonist accepts the metal armlet, signaling peace.
- BT003: The protagonist is lifted onto a Martian mount and taken toward the distant hills.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
